name: Cash+ Visa Signature Card

verdict.text: Keep if you'll enroll new categories — flexible 5%/2% picks

earn_rates.category: Two categories you choose each quarter — first $2,000 combined, then 1%
Prepaid air, hotel & car — Travel Center only
One everyday category you choose — gas/EV, groceries, or dining

earn_note: Categories must be actively enrolled each quarter — miss the deadline and everything defaults to 1%. The two 5% picks come from a list of 12 (fast food, home utilities, streaming, department stores, cell phone, electronics, sporting goods, furniture, movie theaters, ground transportation, gyms, select clothing); the 2% pick is limited to gas/EV charging, groceries, or restaurants. Discount stores/supercenters and wholesale clubs are excluded from grocery- and gas-category bonus rates.

redemption_options.method: Deposit to a U.S. Bank checking or savings account
Statement credit, rewards card, or merchant gift cards

points.note: Actual value depends heavily on hitting the $2,000/quarter cap in your two 5% categories — max out both every quarter and the blended rate on $8,000/year of category spend plus 1% elsewhere lands well above a flat 2% card. Redemption value is highest when deposited to a U.S. Bank account; other redemption paths may pay less.

transfer_partners.highlight: No transfer currency — straight cash back, not a points program.

insurance.detail: Not responsible for unauthorized transactions once reported
Not publicly documented for this card
Not publicly documented for this card
Not publicly documented for this card

protection_note: U.S. Bank doesn't publish a purchase-protection or extended-warranty guide for this card the way it does for Shield — check your actual Guide to Benefits after approval rather than assuming standard Visa Signature protections apply.
rental_note: No auto rental coverage documented publicly for this card as of this writing.

services.name: 0% intro APR
services.detail: 0% on purchases and balance transfers for the first 15 billing cycles, then 17.74%–27.99% variable.

services.name: $250 welcome bonus
services.detail: One-time $250 cash bonus after $1,000 in eligible purchases within the first 90 days.

services.name: U.S. Bank ExtendPay Plan
services.detail: Pay off up to 50% of your credit line in fixed installments with a $0 fee offer for plans opened in the first 60 days.

services.name: Cash-back deals
services.detail: Personalized merchant offers in the U.S. Bank Mobile App based on past spending, stacked on top of the base earn rate.

additional_cards.title: Authorized users

benefits.text: Earns cash back on their spend (into your account)

additional_cards.note: No cost to add users — spend still counts toward the same $2,000/quarter category caps as the primary cardholder's.

timeline.text: Welcome offer increased from $200 to $250 cash back after $1,000 in spend within 90 days.
